learnHub.roadmap: Build your own study roadmap with TOPIK practice, vocab review, and grammar drills.

seo.title: DuHan - Learn Korean Online | Interactive Korean Study Platform
seo.description: Master Korean with DuHan's interactive Korean study platform. Study vocabulary, grammar, TOPIK preparation, podcasts, and videos with AI support.
seo.keywords: Korean learning, Korean study, study Korean, learn Korean, Korean language, TOPIK, Korean vocabulary, Korean grammar, Korean courses

typing.desc: Say goodbye to 'hunt and peck' typing. Build muscle memory from basic letters to full articles with our built-in smart typing practice. Experience the rhythm of native Korean typing directly in your browser without installing extra software.
typing.feature1Desc: Letter-level error correction helps you quickly correct key position memory.
typing.feature2Desc: Smart prediction highlights the next key for instant visual feedback. Build muscle memory naturally through fluid practice, no rote memorization needed.

hero.desc: But with a scientific method, you can move faster. DuHan helps you study Korean with TOPIK past papers, vocabulary drills, and AI coaching.

topik.desc: Not just a PDF download. We rebuilt the real TOPIK computer-based experience—auto audio, timed reading, and detailed post-test analysis.
topik.point1Desc: No more searching forums. Everything is organized in one place.
topik.point2Desc: See at a glance whether listening or reading is holding you back.

fsrs.desc: Rote memorization is inefficient. DuHan uses the latest Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler to predict when you’ll forget and prompts you exactly at that moment.

ai.desc: Confused by long sentences or subtle endings? Tap any sentence and the AI breaks down grammar, context, and provides examples—in your language.
ai.userQuestion: What does -다가 mean in this sentence?
ai.botAnswer: Here, -다가 indicates an action that changes mid-way: while going to school, the second action (meeting a friend) happened before arriving.

toolbox.title: Not even close.
toolbox.subtitle: Click a card below to explore DuHan’s powerful learning toolbox.
toolbox.card1Desc: Turn your vocab list into A4 dictation sheets. Multiple layouts designed for real handwriting practice.
toolbox.card2Desc: Not just listening—every episode comes with an AI-generated, time-synced transcript.
toolbox.card2Point1Desc: Words follow the audio in real time
toolbox.card3Desc: Learn Korean like scrolling TikTok. Don’t understand the grammar? The AI breaks it down instantly.
toolbox.card3Tip: Hover the purple word to see AI analysis

pdf.siteTagline: 10 minutes a day, learn Korean easily

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: Is it suitable for absolute beginners?
faq.a1: Yes. We start from Hangul and provide graded readings aligned with TOPIK1.
faq.q2: Are the TOPIK past papers up to date?
faq.a2: Yes. We include publicly released papers from earlier rounds to the latest available and keep updating.
faq.a3: We offer a 14-day refund guarantee. Email support and we’ll refund you.

guides.title: Start with practical Korean study guides
guides.subtitle: Build your roadmap with SEO-optimized guide pages for TOPIK, vocabulary, grammar, and writing.

vocab.description: Retain words long term with SRS, dictation, and context review.

writing.description: Use clear templates and timed revision checklists for higher scores.

q1.q: Can I get a refund if I’m not satisfied?
q1.a: Yes. We offer a 14-day refund guarantee. Email support and we’ll refund you.

q2.a: Yes. You can cancel in account settings. Benefits remain until the end of the billing period.
